# A 33rd Wife Poem*Created: Friday, May 29, 2020 at 10:19:24?AM*<div><h1>A 33rd Wife Poem</h1></div>
<div><br></div>
<div><u>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=neF1vblGHOA&ampab_channel=MajorLeagueBeats</u><u><br></u></div>
<div>Find Your Smile - Instrumental Poetry &amp SpokenWord Beat ( J Cole , Wale )</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Oh man, oh dear wife. Where do the years go when life is suppressed and forgotten depending on the partner one IŐm choosesj  for their entire life. </div>
<div>IŐve chosen a sparkle tha my my j t lit up nook my eyes,hm<br></div>
<div>My heart beamed into outer core of my being. Hey <br></div>
<div>Happy Birthday, weŐre here to celebrate you! </div>
<div>But my<br></div>
<div>IŐve been celebrating you since I met </div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/png;base64,"/><br></div>
<div> you! </div>
<div>YouŐre my bolded &amp under lining up po emu<br></div>
<div>Breathing lukewarm air in order to get close to you so that I can kiss you upon your lips</div>
<div>Upon the mistletoe,</div>
<div>How dirty unless you change your mindset,</div>
<div>But thatŐs who I was before I met you, </div>
<div>A mindset of a lost artist then I met you,</div>
<div>Extravagant grounding roots took hold of me and brought me next to you,</div>
<div>WeŐre connected at the stems. </div>
<div>How quickly days, weeks, months and years go by.</div>
<div>Thinking of all the times you and I shared moments of happiness &amp joy</div>
<div>ItŐs been the truest, realist and I wouldnŐt change it in the least. </div>
<div>YouŐre my cornerstone! My foundational SpaceX rocket designedp by me and Elon Musk</div>
<div>Nah, youŐre my Tesla and IŐm a software that runs deep into your outer-core. </div>
<div>Connected in so many ways. </div>
<div>I hope that you can see the changes you have made within yourself, how much youŐve grown and accomplished. My<br></div>
<div>YouŐre really my superstar; a spark that torches the skies. YouŐre my inspiration, really my motivation. </div>
<div>IŐm so proud of the work you do anything continue doing with all the difficulties that might come your way. You smile and continue pushing forward and thatŐs a rare ART. YouŐre in another zone and I know youŐll go even further if you dedicate on focusing on your internal desires whenever you get inspired, pick up a torch and transcribe your emotions so, when Ella gets older she can be inspired by the most accomplished, strong and focused mother who fought for her family when things turned dark. You have a bark that ultimately brings focus on your abilities to believe in yourself no matter your capabilities and thatŐs the beautiful part of this whole creativity that you source into your own being. YouŐre the creator and IŐm seeing your creation and I canŐt mention it enough but youŐre growing into a beautiful blissful moment of your own memories so when you look back at your memories only happiness seeps from your creation that you put into your own reality. </div>
<div><br></div>
<div><b>Chorus</b><br></div>
<div>YouŐre the reality </div>
<div>The magical potion of exploration </div>
<div>Gift to the highest form</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>YouŐre the reality </div>
<div>The magical potion of exploration </div>
<div>Gift to the highest form</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>The reason I named this poem a 33rd poem is because in numerology itŐs an angel number. 3:33 which symbolizes aid, encouragement. YouŐre my symbol of encouraging, inspiring and motivating me to move forward no matter the difficulties that something like a pandemic and end of the world scenarios might bring. </div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Put into the view as love galore, my explorer with a devotion of my emotions running wild like the oceans do in summer heat a play on words so they dig deep into your membrane like an ancient hymn, sporadically, IŐll then release all the built up from your emotions I will do it again later this is the best SowmyathatŐs what brings in the flowery delight that ignited your spark of you outperforming a metaphor itŐs like a true human story when our ancestors heard it and passed down to their children and itŐs this channeling flow that creates their sight to see and seek internal happiness bliss, do you understand what all this means? </div>
<div><br></div>
<div>ItŐs so confusing and abstract it will continue to always last, because thatŐs our story, our child is Ella Anna Basin and you and I are a part of our own storytelling poem. </div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Happy Birthday baby, Marina! I love you beyond measures of the worldŐs breathes. </div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Sincerely,</div>
<div>Your husband, Leonid (Leon) Borisovich Basin</div>
